content:
FINAL IVX CHAT ROOM DEPLOYMENT — REPO LOCK

Work ONLY on this GitHub repo:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Do not inspect or build any other repo.
Do not create a new empty app.
Do not use placeholder project.
Clone/pull this repo and complete IVX Chat Room deployment end-to-end.

TASKS

1. Confirm repo
REPO: ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1
BRANCH:
LATEST_COMMIT_SHA:
WORKSPACE_PATH:

2. Build IVX Chat Room
- Owner AI chat screen
- Send message
- Receive assistant reply
- Save conversation
- Load history
- No disappearing messages
- No duplicate false error
- Fix “couldn't read its response”
- Fix “TypeError: Network request failed”

3. Backend
Verify or build:
- GET /health
- POST /api/ivx/owner-ai/chat
- POST /api/chat/message
- conversation save/load endpoints

4. Supabase
Verify:
- conversations table
- messages table
- owner_ai_messages table
- owner_ai_conversations table
- insert message
- read message
- reload conversation

5. Render deployment
Deploy backend/frontend from repo:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Return:
- Render service
- Render deploy ID
- deploy status
- deploy timestamp
- production URL

6. Production verification
Test live:
- /health returns 200
- chat sends message
- assistant responds
- message saves
- refresh loads history
- no network request failed

7. Monitor proof
Monitor must show:
- GitHub commit SHA
- Render deploy ID
- health 200
- chat API status
- Supabase status
- chat save/load status
- blockers

FINAL OUTPUT ONLY

REPO:
BRANCH:
COMMIT_SHA:
RENDER_SERVICE:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
HEALTH_STATUS:
CHAT_API_STATUS:
SUPABASE_STATUS:
CHAT_SAVE_STATUS:
CHAT_LOAD_STATUS:
FRONTEND_CHAT_STATUS:
MONITOR_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:
COMPLETE
BLOCKED
LOCAL ONLY
UNVERIFIED

Do not say COMPLETE unless production chat works end-to-end with proof.
